item.title: Supraja - Villa - 1 bhk
item.dc:creator: web_f710o53w
item.content:encoded:
Madurai’s only retirement community Supraja, exclusively for seniors. The community houses a dedicated kitchen serving delicious vegetarian food, service centre with library, Doctor on call combined with diligent service. 

Isn't it a great retirement? You have a lot of free time to travel, discover new hobbies and spend time with friends. But if you're like many retirees, retirement may not be as fulfilling as you imagined. Moving into senior living offers an exciting new chapter in a person's life. Whether you want a taste of the good life in a safe environment or need assistance with daily activities, retirement communities are constantly changing to better serve their residents. The individual unit designs aim to provide a safer home and follow the "One Level Homes" approach to make spaces safer and improve ease to access.

Check out for more details on our YouTube channel -
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

item.title: Virat C Block - 2BHK Apartments - Vilangudi, Madurai
item.dc:creator: web_f710o53w
item.content:encoded:
VIRAT - MADURAI’S MOST PRISTINE LIVING EXPERIENCE, WITHOUT A COMPROMISE.

Amenities at Virat: Parking for apartments on the stilt floor. Power back up for Common areas and all light and fans. Sewage treatment plant and comprehensive Rain water harvesting system. Right besides Visthara, Madurai’s gated community. Next to Adhyapana School, C.B.S.E. Floors: Stilt (parking) + 4 Block C: 32 2BHK units

Visvas Virat which has Apartment at Dindigul Highway, Madurai is the most demanded locality for the ones who desire to invest in future perspectives too. Dindigul Highway, Madurai is in close proximity to major companies. In Madurai, the demand for real estate is continually scaling. Also, many business establishments along with well-known schools, colleges, medical centers, shopping malls and places of relaxation is in close vicinity to Visvas Virat. Visvas Virat is strategically crafted keeping in mind even the smallest details. It comprises all world-class amenities such as 24Hrs Water Supply, 24Hrs Backup Electricity, Bank/ATM, Covered Car Parking, Fire Safety, Landscaped Garden, Maintenance Staff, Play Area, Rain Water Harvesting, Temple and Security Personnel.

Location Advantages: The Visvas Virat is strategically located with close proximity to all civic amenities such as schools, colleges, hospitals, shopping malls, grocery stores, restaurants, recreational centers etc. The complete address of Visvas Virat is Dindigal Highway, Madurai, Tamil Nadu, INDIA.

RERA NO: TN/20/Building / 475 / 2022 Check out for more details on our youtube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

item.title: Aparna - 1 BHK Apartments - Thuvarimaan, Madurai
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to Aparna: A Beacon of Modern Living

Nestled adjacent to other esteemed Visvas projects like Viprosaa, Aprameya, and Shreyas, Aparna stands out as a beacon of refinement, designed to elevate the standard of living for its future residents. With a commitment to quality and a focus on community, Aparna promises an exceptional living experience tailored to meet the diverse needs of its inhabitants.

Thoughtfully Designed Studio Units

At the heart of Aparna are its studio units, meticulously crafted for those seeking versatile living spaces. These studios are perfect for young professionals, students, or anyone looking for a streamlined lifestyle. Unlike traditional apartments, studio apartments offer an open layout that seamlessly combines the living room, kitchen, and sleeping area, fostering a sense of spaciousness and functionality. The design includes a separate, enclosed bathroom, providing privacy and convenience. This modern approach makes studio units a more affordable option for individuals who desire a comfortable home without the burden of high costs, making it an attractive choice for budget-conscious residents.

A Flourishing Community with Abundant Amenities

Aparna is not just about stylish living; it’s about creating a vibrant community. Residents can enjoy a plethora of amenities that enhance their lifestyle and foster a sense of togetherness. The indoor badminton court and dedicated indoor game space invite friendly competition and active engagement among neighbors, while the table tennis area offers a fun way to unwind and socialize.

For those who seek tranquility and wellness, the yoga deck is a perfect spot for meditation and relaxation, allowing residents to maintain a balanced lifestyle amidst the hustle and bustle of city life. Families will appreciate the thoughtfully designed children’s play area, where kids can explore, play, and make lasting memories in a safe environment.

Unique Outdoor Features

Aparna’s open-air theater provides a unique venue for community gatherings, movie nights, and cultural events, fostering connections among residents. The tree-lined driveway not only enhances the aesthetic appeal of the community but also encourages outdoor activities, whether it’s a leisurely walk or a jog.

A Safe and Secure Environment

Safety and security are paramount in Aparna's design. The gated community ensures that residents feel secure in their homes, allowing families to thrive in a safe environment. The presence of well-maintained greenery and outdoor spaces contributes to a peaceful atmosphere, making it an ideal setting for both children and adults.

The combination of recreational facilities, green spaces, and a secure environment creates a holistic living experience that appeals to individuals and families alike. Aparna is more than just a place to live; it’s a community where residents can build relationships, enjoy amenities, and feel truly at home.

In summary, Aparna represents a harmonious blend of modern design, affordability, and community living. Whether you are a young professional looking for your first home, a family seeking a safe place for your children to grow, or anyone in between, Aparna provides the perfect backdrop for a fulfilling lifestyle. Embrace a new standard of living at Aparna, where comfort, convenience, and community converge.

RERA NO: TN/20/Building / 414 / 2023 Check out for more details on our YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

item.title: Madhyapuri - 3 BHK Apartments - Ellis Nagar, Madurai
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Madhyapuri - 3 BHK Apartments for sale in Madurai

Discover Madhyapuri, Ellis Nagar : Your Dream Home Awaits

Madhyapuri is breath of fresh air and adds life to your home at the heart of the city. Madhyapuri is the original locational name of Immayilum Nanmai Tharuvar temple, also located just 5 minutes from your home.

A Luxurious Living Experience

Step into your dream home at Madhyapuri, where every detail is meticulously crafted to redefine luxury living. Each apartment features three spacious bedrooms, thoughtfully designed to offer comfort and privacy for every member of the family. The inclusion of two sit-outs allows you to enjoy the gentle breeze and lush views, creating perfect spaces for relaxation or casual gatherings.

The apartment’s pooja room serves as a tranquil sanctuary, providing a dedicated space for meditation and spiritual reflection. This serene corner of your home invites peace and mindfulness, making it easy to integrate moments of stillness into your busy life.

The modern modular kitchen is a chef’s delight, equipped with state-of-the-art appliances and ample storage solutions. Whether you're preparing a quick breakfast or hosting a lavish dinner, this kitchen is designed to meet all your culinary needs while reflecting contemporary elegance.

Abundant Natural Light and Open Spaces

The spacious living areas are flooded with natural light, enhancing the cozy ambiance and creating an inviting atmosphere for both relaxation and entertaining. Large windows not only provide stunning views but also ensure that every corner of your home is bright and welcoming. This seamless blend of indoor and outdoor living spaces allows for a harmonious lifestyle, where nature becomes an integral part of your daily routine.

Exclusive Amenities for Every Family Member

Madhyapuri offers a host of luxurious amenities designed for the modern family. Upon entering, residents are greeted by a double-height lobby and a welcoming reception area, setting the tone for the elegance that awaits inside. Fitness enthusiasts will appreciate the first-rate air-conditioned gym, equipped with the latest exercise machines and free weights, making it easy to maintain an active lifestyle without having to leave home.

Families can enjoy leisurely walks in the beautifully landscaped gardens or let children explore the dedicated play area designed just for them. The thoughtfully planned walking spaces invite you to take a stroll, connect with neighbors, and enjoy the fresh air.

A Community at Your Fingertips

Madhyapuri is more than just a collection of residences; it’s a vibrant community that brings together individuals and families from all walks of life. With 46 premium 3 BHK residences, each home boasts a 5-foot wide sit-out in the living room and a sit-out in the master bedroom, allowing you to soak in the serene atmosphere right from your private space.

Location is key, and Madhyapuri excels in this aspect as well. Just minutes away from essential landmarks, residents enjoy unmatched convenience. Madurai Junction is less than five minutes away, making commuting effortless, while the iconic Meenakshi Amman Temple is only eight minutes from your home. For those traveling by road, the Bypass Road is a mere three minutes away, connecting you to various parts of the city and beyond.

Choosing Madhyapuri means investing in a lifestyle that harmonizes luxury, comfort, and community. With its exceptional design, modern amenities, and strategic location, this residential haven offers everything you need to create lasting memories with your loved ones.

Experience the joy of living in a home that not only meets your needs but also elevates your everyday life. Discover the beauty of Madhyapuri—where your dream home awaits. Embrace a life of elegance and tranquility in a community that truly feels like home. Welcome to your future at Madhyapuri!

RERA NO: TN/20/Building / 0348 / 2024 Check out for more details on our YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

Ajita 3 BHK Premium Villa for Sale

Visvas Ajita is an community located adjacent to other Visvas Projects (Viprosaa, Aprameya and Shreyas). Easy to access to the best schools in town, Ajita is set away from the humdrum of city life yet close to all urban comforts. Ajita is a heaven of calm, convenience and serenity.

Of course, a modern community wouldn't be complete without easy access to essentials, and Ajita fulfills this need as well. Residents can be surrounded by a wide variety of commercial shopping centers, grocery stores, restaurants, and entertainment venues in a matter of minutes. Everything you need is close by, whether you're feeling like going out for a late-afternoon brunch with pals or going shopping on the errand of the moment.

Ajita provides convenient and easy configuration of 3 BHK and 4 BHK. It is also ideal balance when you want the convenience of having your families near and they get to preserve their independence.

In addition to its prime location, Visvas Vajra also boasts excellent connectivity to highways and public transportation. This ensures effortless navigation throughout the town and beyond. Whether residents prefer to drive or rely on public transportation, they can easily reach their desired destinations without any hassle. This level of connectivity is particularly advantageous for those who commute to work or frequently travel for business or leisure.

Overall, Visvas Vajra offers a luxurious, secure, and convenient lifestyle in an ideal location. Its strategic positioning allows residents to have easy access to all essential amenities, while nearby parks and recreational areas provide opportunities for relaxation and rejuvenation. item.title: Ajita - Phase II
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Ajita -  villa project is brought to you by Visvas Promoters Private Ltd, a renowned name in the real estate sector for years in crafting exceptional living spaces. Known for their commitment to quality and innovative design, Visvas Promoters has successfully delivered numerous residential projects across Madurai, Tamil nadu.

Ajita - 3 & 4 BHK Luxury Villa for sale

In quest of searching for perfect villa, the independent house is available for sale. The choice between a 3 BHK and 4 BHK villa often arises. There are different lifestyles and cater to different need and preferences. The primary difference between 3 BHK and 4 BHK villa lies in terms of the spatial layout.

The 3 BHK villas is perfect for small to mid sized families or individuals. These provides spacious living area, kitchen and hall with exclusive balconies, making them perfect for hosting gathering or enjoying a evening with loved ones. Apart from spatial layout, budget also play a major role in deciding a home or villa. 4 BHK villas comes with a higher price tag with all its expectation when compared to 3 BHK counterparts due to the square feet and basic amenities.

The vibrant community extends outdoor with tree lined driveway and garden space, which is perfect for evening gathering or simply unwinding amidst nature’s beauty. Safety and security are paramount within our gated community, where lush greenery and ample outdoor spaces offer peace of mind and a refreshing change from urban hustle.

Ajita is located in the Aprameya Project Phase, Thuvariman, adjacent to other Visvas projects. 5 Kms from kalavasal junction & less than 10 minutes away from Queen Mira / Kappalur industrial. Easy access to the best school in town and set away from the humdrum of city life yet close to all urban comforts.

In light of the remarkable success and swift reservations of Phase 1, thrilled to announce the extension of phase 2, located near the Shreyas Community. This expansion reflects the significant demand and excitement expressed by our esteemed customers. The upcoming phase will feature additional residential units crafted to meet the same exceptional standards. Ajita’s Phase 2 is set to offer improved amenities, contemporary infrastructure, and an unwavering dedication to quality and customer satisfaction.

RERA NO: TN/20/Building / 0539 / 2024 Check out for more details on our YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

item.title: Vidhatri - Premium Apartments in Ponmeni
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Visvas Vidhatri – Buy Premium Apartments in Ponmeni

Visvas Vidhatri offers premium 2BHK & 3BHK homes in the serene, picturesque neighborhood of Ponmeni. Situated just 100 meters from Jeevana School and just behind Dolphin School, this project is perfect for families, with the convenience of children being able to walk to school safely even when you're not around. With a focus on modern, metro-style living, residents will enjoy top-notch amenities, including a swimming pool, a 2500 sq ft gym, a dedicated kids' play area, and an exclusive Hall for hosting events. This blend of luxury and comfort ensures that every day feels like a special occasion.

The homes at Visvas Vidhatri have been conceptualized to enhance everyday living. The spacious layouts and well-designed interiors reflect a harmonious balance of form and function. The design thoughtfully precedence natural ventilation to create healthy, livable environments. Strategically placed openings invite an abundance of natural light while facilitating optimal airflow throughout each living space, Whether you choose a 2BHK or 3BHK configuration, each unit offers ample space for families with the touch of modern amenities.

Thoughtfully Designed for Families

Residents will appreciate the seamless blend of indoor comfort and outdoor beauty. The neighborhood is designed to promote outdoor activities, making it an ideal setting for morning/evening walks or simply enjoying the outdoors in a secure, well-maintained environment. This mainly focuses on a healthy and balanced lifestyle for both parents and kids, complemented by the overall aesthetic of the community.

Vidhatri - Safe & Secure gated community

Apart from these, the community emphasizes built-in CCTV surveillance and 24/7 security, which is a great advantage. All of our gated communities place a strong feature on safety and are equipped with 24/7 inverter backup, ensuring uninterrupted electricity even during power cuts.

In addition to the premium lifestyle, Visvas Vidhatri offers Prime location convenience with a two-minute delivery from McDonald's, Domino's, and Instamart apps. Whether you're indulging in a quick snack or enjoying a relaxed evening, everything you need is right at your doorstep.

RERA NO: TN/20/Building / 0061 / 2025 Check out for more details on our YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

item.title: Amita - 3BHK Duplex Villas
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Visvas Amita – Experience Premium 3BHK Duplex Villa Living

As part of a thriving, yet pristine neighbourhood Amita has the perfect ingrediants for great lifestyle. Phase I comprises 40 exquisite villas of duplex configuration.The ground floor consists of a living room, kitchen, dining and a bedroom. And the first floor comes with a family room and two bedrooms. Apart from parking space for two cars, the villas also includes a convenient backyard utility space and a optional kitchen garden.

Visvas Amita is more than just a thoughtfully designed space or a strategically located community. It embodies all the rich igredients for a great lifestyle. The community is home to not just happy families, but healthy mind and bodies as well.

Thoughtfully Designed Amenities for Everyday Convenience

The sports and recreational amenities include Gym, Community hall, Yoga deck, Children's play area, Walking track, Open green space, Rooftop party space, Indoor game space. Essential amenities include Elevated ground level, Blacktop roads, Premiun way signs & directional boards, Landscaping and avenue trees, Underground cabling for power & telecom, Pneumatic water supply system, Sewage treatment plant, 24/7 Power backup & CCTV.

Visvas Amita os part of a well established community of 250+ completed homes in Thuvarimaan. It is locared in proximity to yet another of our prestigious projects, visvas Aprameya 150 villa community with state of the art amenities.

As an upcoming residential neighbourhood, Thuvarimaan is forever abuzz with activity. It has the perfect combination of a pristine, pollution free neighbourhood and a strategic location that's easily accessible to top schools, colleges, hospital and highways.

What makes us Madurai's most trusted developer?

with a reputation for excellence for over three decades now, Visvas is a household name in Madurai. Our projects symbolise trust,convenience and comfortable living. Whether it is adherence to statutory norms. Construction quality or legal standards. We're trusted to only deliver the best. This isn't something we've cultivated. It is what comes to us naturally. which is why customers keep coming back to us gneration after generation.

Check out for more details on our YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg

item.title: Ajita Phase II
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Ajita Phase II - 3 & 4 BHK Premium Villa for Sale

Visvas Ajita is an community located adjacent to other Visvas Projects (Viprosaa, Aprameya and Shreyas). Easy to access to the best schools in town, Ajita is set away from the humdrum of city life yet close to all urban comforts. Ajita is a heaven of calm, convenience and serenity.

Of course, a modern community wouldn't be complete without easy access to essentials, and Ajita fulfills this need as well. Residents can be surrounded by a wide variety of commercial shopping centers, grocery stores, restaurants, and entertainment venues in a matter of minutes. Everything you need is close by, whether you're feeling like going out for a late-afternoon brunch with pals or going shopping on the errand of the moment.

Ajita provides convenient and easy configuration of 3 BHK and 4 BHK. It is also ideal balance when you want the convenience of having your families near and they get to preserve their independence.

Check out for more details on our YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkXd5yjvJ5TE5BdDcMeuCtg
